label: t1_tpl_params
note: M6 4->3 only; level 3 is valid and changes TPL FULL_PEL->QUARTER_PEL, while diagonal control remains 4; M3/M4/M5/M7 stay 4

label: t1_sg_restoration
note: M6 SG restoration 0->3 only (match <=M3); existing 8K/fast-decode override remains 0

label: t1_wiener
note: Non-last-layer M6 Wiener 5->4 only (match <=M3); last layer and 8K remain 0
